title: Symformers
description: A Transformers Mod for Minecraft 1.20.1 using Palladium as its Core Mod. Experience High Quality Transformers Content on one of the latest modded versions of Minecraft
body:
![Poster for the SymFormers Mod that showcases all the Transformers currently in the Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4430555d428a05b32b7d2a953cf4a4e80c9bf02b.png)

### SymFormers is a Mod Developed using the Palladium Core
\
**A ComicCraft Mod**

This Mod adds High Quality Transformers to Minecraft. From the Honorable Autobots to the Deceiving Decepticons, we offer high quality Transformers with Animated Transformations and Weapons!

Currently contains 4 Transformers from the G1 Universe and 3 Transformers from the Bayverse

_Notice: This Mod from ComicCraft is still a WIP. Expect some Transformers to not have as many Abilities. We plan to continue adding onto existing Transformers Post-Launch. Play on Fabric for the Smoothest Experience!_

[ComicCraft Discord](https://discord.com/invite/comiccraft 'ComicCraft Discord')

\
![Seperate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9dc6d874a9f649d75cc7e7348152465702ad9450.png)

# Features:
- Access the **Cybertronian Computer** to unlock your inner AllSpark and become a Transformer
  - Custom _GUI System_ never seen before in any Mod using Palladium
- **Bayverse Transformers** with High Quality Models and Animations that make it feel as if they jumped out of the Movies and straight into Minecraft
- Unleash your Cog to Transform into a variety of Vehicles depending on the Transformer you have become
- Transformers Inspired Ship Structures throughout the Minecraft World:
  - **AutoBot Ark Ship**: Find Autobot Insignias, Energon Fragments and Living Metal
  - **Decepticon Nemesis Ship**: Find Decepticon Insignias, Dark Energon Fragments and Living Metal
  - *Small chance of finding BayFormer Tokens*
- **High Quality Transformation Animations** for every Transformer Suit
- Integration with other mods like Ad Astra to enhance the gameplay experience (Transformers can Breathe in Space!)
- Unlock Abilities with Transformers Skill Points
- Transformers **Abilities and Weapons**
  - Ion Blaster
  - Energon Sword
  - Energon Axe
  - Energon Shield
  - Transform
- Very Rare **Energon** and **Dark Energon** Crystals dispersed throughout Caves in the Overworld

\
![Seperate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9dc6d874a9f649d75cc7e7348152465702ad9450.png)

## Mod Requirements:
[Palladium](https://modrinth.com/mod/threetag-palladium), [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib), [KubeJS](https://modrinth.com/mod/kubejs), [Rhino](https://modrinth.com/mod/rhino), [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api), [Pehkui](https://modrinth.com/mod/pehkui), [Curios API (Forge)](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios)/[Trinkets (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets)

Please use [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) to view all _Recipes_ in the Mod

\
![Seperate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9dc6d874a9f649d75cc7e7348152465702ad9450.png)

## Official Server
- Server IP: **_Palladium.ComicCraft.net_**
- [Modrinth ModPack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/palladium-superheroes-server)
- [CurseForge ModPack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/palladium-superheroes-server)
- _Notice: This is only the Official Server for ComicCraft Mods made using Palladium (specifically, Sym's Armored Industries and Symformers). This is not the Official Server for the Palladium Mod in General!_

\
![Seperate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9dc6d874a9f649d75cc7e7348152465702ad9450.png)

## FAQ

<details>
<summary>Click to view FAQ</summary>
When will X Transformer be added?

- Here at ComicCraft and SymFormers, we strive to provide the Highest Quality content in our Mods. Due to this, we cannot provide estimations of when a certain Transformer will be added. Please be patient and know that whenever the Transformer you're interested in is added, it'll be created in perfection. _We will also hold Votes on our Patreon where Supporters can Vote a single new Suit addition from a group of choices_

Will you add Transformers from X Universe?
- Currently, we're focused on adding Transformers from the Bayverse Universe (with some updates to G1 Content)
  - Other than that, we're happy to add Transformers from any Universe, granted we get the models for it!

Why the *bleep* do most Transformers have no Abilities!?
- Again, most resources were allocated to Sym's Armored Industries so we didn't have the time or the Modellers to expand on the content of SymFormers for release. 
- Optimus Prime is the most completed Transformer Suit in the Mod and is how we expect all other Transformers to be like in later Updates
  - We will expand on other Transformers and their abilities in future updates

How do I craft Transformers?
- You must first Craft the Cybertronian Computer. Please use JEI (or some other similar Mod) to view the Recipe for it. 
- The Recipes for the actual Transformers can be viewed in the Cybertronian Computer. 
  - All Autobots need an Autobot Insignia (found in Autobot Ship Structures)
  - All Autobots need an Decepticon Insignia (found in Decepticon Ship Structures)
  - All Bayverse Transformers need a Bayverse Token to be Crafted
- Every Transformers needs Living metal (found in either Ship Structure) and Energon (mainly found as an Ore in the Overworld)

Where do I get X Material!?
- Living Metal is found in the Autobot/Decepticon Ships
- Energon is mainly found as an Ore throughout Caves in the Overworld
- Autobot Insignias are found in Autobot Ships
- Decepticon Insignias are found in Decepticon Ships
- Bayverse Tokens are found in Autobot/Decepticon Ships _(they're very rare!)_
</details>

\
![Seperate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9dc6d874a9f649d75cc7e7348152465702ad9450.png)

## Commands and Transformers Skill Points System

<details>
<summary>Click to View the List of Commands</summary>

/tfpoints check
- Shows the number of Skill Points you have for the exact Transformer you're wearing when running the command. It also shows the progress X/50 until your next Skill Point
- Skill Points are Per-Transformer

/tfpointsadmin (player) (transformer_id) (amount of skill points)
- Gives a player a specific amount of Skill Points for a specific Transformer
- The (transformer_id) argument is the name of the transformer
  - For Optimus Prime, this would be optimusprime
  - All Bayverse Transformers have an id of name_bayverse

/tfpointsadmin (player) *
- Gives a player 100 Skill Points for all Transformers

</details>

<details>
<summary>Click for Info Regarding the Skill Point System</summary>

50 Points of Progress will be needed to get one Skill Point for each Transformer separately. Progress is separate for each Transformer and each Player. Progress is Obtained by killing Mobs while wearing a Specific Transformer

Mobs and the Progress Points they Provide:
- Base Mobs (zombies, skeletons, creepers, enderman, etc.) give 1-2/50 Progress
- Ender Dragon gives 50/50 Progress
- Warden gives 50/50 Progress
- Wither gives 20/50 Progress

Getting 50/50 Progress awards 1 Skill Point FOR THE TRANSFORMER YOU KILLED THE MOB WITH. Progress will be separate for each Player and for each Transformer they have.

</details>

\
![Seperate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9dc6d874a9f649d75cc7e7348152465702ad9450.png)
